ddls:
CREATE TABLE "properties" (
  "property_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each property */,
  "square_meters" INTEGER /* Total area of the property in square meters */,
  "number_of_rooms" INTEGER /* Number of rooms in the property */,
  "has_yard" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the property has a yard (0 = No, 1 = Yes) */,
  "city_code" INTEGER /* City code where the property is located */,
  "num_prev_owners" INTEGER /* Number of previous owners of the property */,
  "made" INTEGER /* Year the property was built or last renovated */,
  "is_new_built" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the property is newly built (0 = No, 1 = Yes) */,
  "price" TEXT /* Current market price of the property */,
  "listing_status" TEXT /* Status of the property listing (e.g., available, sold, rented) */,
  "property_type" TEXT /* Type of property (e.g., apartment, house, condo) */,
  "parking_available" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the property has parking available (0 = No, 1 = Yes) */,
  "number_of_floors" INTEGER /* Number of floors in the property */,
  "energy_efficiency_rating" TEXT /* Energy efficiency rating of the property (e.g., A, B, C) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("property_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_properties_city_code FOREIGN KEY ("city_code") REFERENCES cities ("city_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "cities" (
  "city_code" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each city */,
  "city_name" TEXT /* Name of the city */,
  "state" TEXT /* State or province where the city is located */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the city is located */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Estimated population of the city */,
  "average_property_price" TEXT /* Average property price in the city */,
  "latitude" TEXT /* Latitude of the city */,
  "longitude" TEXT /* Longitude of the city */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("city_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., agent, manager, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "property_transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property involved in the transaction */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the transaction */,
  "transaction_type" TEXT /* Type of transaction (e.g., sale, rental) */,
  "transaction_date" TEXT /* Date of the transaction */,
  "amount" TEXT /* Amount of the transaction */,
  "commission" TEXT /* Commission earned from the transaction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_property_transactions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_property_transactions_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "property_images" (
  "image_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each image */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property the image belongs to */,
  "image_path" TEXT /* File path to the image */,
  "image_description" TEXT /* Description of the image */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the image was uploaded */,
  "image_type" TEXT /* Type of image (e.g., interior, exterior, floor plan) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("image_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_property_images_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "property_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each history entry */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property the history entry belongs to */,
  "update_type" TEXT /* Type of update (e.g., renovation, new construction) */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date of the update */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the update */,
  "cost" TEXT /* Cost of the update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_property_history_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "property_features" (
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feature */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property the feature belongs to */,
  "feature_name" TEXT /* Name of the feature (e.g., pool, gym, garden) */,
  "feature_description" TEXT /* Description of the feature */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feature_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_property_features_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "property_reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property the review belongs to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who wrote the review */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date the review was written */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating of the property (e.g., 1-5 stars) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_property_reviews_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_property_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
